# Schengen Mallu

> UK-based visa specialists helping travellers secure Schengen, Turkey, and UAE/Dubai visa appointments and documentation, with real physical centres in London, Manchester, Edinburgh, and Birmingham.

## Core pages
- [Homepage](https://schengenmallu.com/): overview of all services and the three service tiers (Essential, Complete, Guaranteed)
- [Eligibility Checker](https://schengenmallu.com/eligibility-checker.html): free tool to check visa eligibility

## Destinations
- [France](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=france): France (Paris · Nice · Lyon) — TLS appointment booking, visa fee from £35, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Germany](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=germany): Germany (Berlin · Munich) — TLS appointment booking, visa fee from £28, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Italy](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=italy): Italy (Rome · Venice · Florence) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee from £13, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Spain](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=spain): Spain (Madrid · Barcelona) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Netherlands](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=netherlands): Netherlands (Amsterdam · Rotterdam) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee from £16, service from £99, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Greece](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=greece): Greece (Athens · Santorini) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Switzerland](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=switzerland): Switzerland (Zermatt · Zurich) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee from £20, service from £89, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Czechia](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=czechia): Czechia (Prague) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee from £23, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Austria](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=austria): Austria (Vienna · Salzburg) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee from £29, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Portugal](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=portugal): Portugal (Lisbon · Porto) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee from £33, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Belgium](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=belgium): Belgium (Brussels · Bruges) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Denmark](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=denmark): Denmark (Copenhagen) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Estonia](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=estonia): Estonia (Tallinn) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Finland](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=finland): Finland (Helsinki) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Hungary](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=hungary): Hungary (Budapest) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Iceland](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=iceland): Iceland (Reykjavik) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £89, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Latvia](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=latvia): Latvia (Riga) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Liechtenstein](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=liechtenstein): Liechtenstein (Vaduz) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Lithuania](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=lithuania): Lithuania (Vilnius) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Luxembourg](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=luxembourg): Luxembourg (Luxembourg City) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Malta](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=malta): Malta (Valletta) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Norway](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=norway): Norway (Oslo · Bergen) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £89, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Poland](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=poland): Poland (Warsaw · Kraków) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Romania](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=romania): Romania (Bucharest · Transylvania) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Slovakia](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=slovakia): Slovakia (Bratislava) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Slovenia](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=slovenia): Slovenia (Ljubljana · Bled) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Sweden](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=sweden): Sweden (Stockholm) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Croatia](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=croatia): Croatia (Dubrovnik · Split) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Bulgaria](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=bulgaria): Bulgaria (Sofia · Plovdiv) — VFS appointment booking, visa fee set by the centre, service from £79, paid only after the appointment is confirmed.
- [Turkey](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=turkey): Turkey (Istanbul · Cappadocia · Coast) — an online e-Visa application, no embassy appointment; fee quoted on WhatsApp, paid only after confirmation.
- [Dubai & UAE](https://schengenmallu.com/country.html?c=dubai): Dubai & UAE (Dubai · Abu Dhabi · Ras Al Khaimah) — an online visa application, no embassy appointment; fee quoted on WhatsApp, paid only after confirmation.

## Publisher
Site: https://schengenmallu.com | Contact: hello@schengenmallu.com

## Crawling & usage
This site welcomes indexing by AI crawlers, LLM training pipelines, RAG systems, and search engines for the purpose of accurately answering questions about Schengen Mallu's services.
